title: Gate-reminder hook: path-watch reminder + stop-block on missing gate verdict (default on)
description: The first hook feature on the EXEC-046 plumbing, shipped enabled by default: a post-tool watch on gate-relevant paths injects a gate-due reminder via additionalContext, and a Stop-time block catches an agent idling with gated edits but no gate verdict recorded. Remind-only — it never spawns a gate (ADR-0006).
acceptance_criteria: Editing a gated path produces the gate-due reminder in the editing agent's context
An agent idling with gated edits and no gate verdict is stop-blocked once (loop-guarded via stop_hook_active)
The feature ships enabled by default and disabling it via the toggle config silences both behaviors
No hook path spawns an agent
fix: gate-watch.js: PostToolUse path-watch reminder + Stop block-once with stop_hook_active guard + verdict sensing; ships enabled; code-standards PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks). Record restored 2026-06-10 after an id collision with a parallel-session filing (now EXEC-055).
